# Tracelet LLM Configuration Dump
This file contains the absolute source of truth for Tracelet's configuration API. It is optimized for LLMs and AI agents for code generation.

## class Config
Compound top-level configuration.
- `geo`: GeoConfig
- `app`: AppConfig
- `android`: AndroidConfig
- `ios`: IosConfig
- `http`: HttpConfig
- `logger`: LoggerConfig
- `motion`: MotionConfig
- `geofence`: GeofenceConfig
- `persistence`: PersistenceConfig
- `audit`: AuditConfig
- `privacyZone`: PrivacyZoneConfig
- `security`: SecurityConfig
- `attestation`: AttestationConfig

## class GeoConfig
- `desiredAccuracy`: DesiredAccuracy (Default: DesiredAccuracy.high)
- `distanceFilter`: double (Default: 10.0)
- `stationaryRadius`: double (Default: 25.0)
- `locationTimeout`: int (Default: 60)
- `disableElasticity`: bool (Default: false)
- `elasticityMultiplier`: double (Default: 1.0)
- `stopAfterElapsedMinutes`: int (Default: -1)
- `maxMonitoredGeofences`: int (Default: -1)
- `enableTimestampMeta`: bool (Default: false)
- `enableAdaptiveMode`: bool (Default: false)
- `periodicLocationInterval`: int (Default: 900)
- `periodicDesiredAccuracy`: DesiredAccuracy (Default: DesiredAccuracy.medium)
- `enableSparseUpdates`: bool (Default: false)
- `sparseDistanceThreshold`: double (Default: 50.0)
- `sparseMaxIdleSeconds`: int (Default: 300)
- `enableDeadReckoning`: bool (Default: false)
- `deadReckoningActivationDelay`: int (Default: 0)
- `deadReckoningMaxDuration`: int (Default: 0)
- `filter`: LocationFilter
- `resolveAddress`: bool (Default: false)

## class LocationFilter
- `trackingAccuracyThreshold`: int (Default: 100)
- `maxImpliedSpeed`: int (Default: 80)
- `odometerAccuracyThreshold`: int (Default: 50)
- `policy`: LocationFilterPolicy (Default: LocationFilterPolicy.adjust)
- `rejectMockLocations`: bool (Default: false)
- `mockDetectionLevel`: int (Default: 1)
- `useKalmanFilter`: bool (Default: false)

## class AppConfig
- `stopOnTerminate`: bool (Default: true)
- `startOnBoot`: bool (Default: false)
- `heartbeatInterval`: int (Default: 60)
- `schedule`: List<String> (Default: [])
- `remoteConfigUrl`: String? (Default: null)
- `remoteConfigHeaders`: Map<String, String>? (Default: null)
- `remoteConfigTimeout`: int (Default: 60000)
- `remoteConfigRefreshInterval`: int (Default: 1440)

## class AndroidConfig
- `locationUpdateInterval`: int (Default: 1000)
- `fastestLocationUpdateInterval`: int (Default: 500)
- `batteryBudgetPerHour`: double (Default: 0.0)
- `releaseWakelockWhenStationary`: bool (Default: false)
- `deferTime`: int (Default: 0)
- `allowIdenticalLocations`: bool (Default: false)
- `geofenceModeHighAccuracy`: bool (Default: false)
- `periodicUseForegroundService`: bool (Default: false)
- `periodicUseExactAlarms`: bool (Default: false)
- `scheduleUseAlarmManager`: bool (Default: false)
- `foregroundService`: ForegroundServiceConfig

## class ForegroundServiceConfig
- `enabled`: bool (Default: true)
- `channelId`: String (Default: 'tracelet_channel')
- `channelName`: String (Default: 'Tracelet')
- `notificationTitle`: String (Default: 'Tracelet')
- `notificationText`: String (Default: 'Tracking location in background')
- `notificationColor`: String? (Default: null)
- `notificationSmallIcon`: String? (Default: null)
- `notificationLargeIcon`: String? (Default: null)
- `notificationPriority`: NotificationPriority (Default: NotificationPriority.defaultPriority)
- `notificationOngoing`: bool (Default: true)
- `showNotificationOnPauseOnly`: bool (Default: false)
- `actions`: List<String> (Default: [])

## class IosConfig
- `activityType`: LocationActivityType (Default: LocationActivityType.other)
- `useSignificantChangesOnly`: bool (Default: false)
- `showsBackgroundLocationIndicator`: bool (Default: false)
- `pausesLocationUpdatesAutomatically`: bool (Default: false)
- `locationAuthorizationRequest`: LocationAuthorizationRequest (Default: LocationAuthorizationRequest.always)
- `disableLocationAuthorizationAlert`: bool (Default: false)
- `preventSuspend`: bool (Default: false)

## class HttpConfig
- `url`: String? (Default: null)
- `method`: HttpMethod (Default: HttpMethod.post)
- `headers`: Map<String, String>? (Default: null)
- `params`: Map<String, Object?>? (Default: null)
- `extras`: Map<String, Object?>? (Default: null)
- `httpRootProperty`: String? (Default: 'location')
- `autoSync`: bool (Default: true)
- `batchSync`: bool (Default: false)
- `maxBatchSize`: int (Default: 250)
- `autoSyncThreshold`: int (Default: 0)
- `autoSyncDelay`: int (Default: 10000)
- `httpTimeout`: int (Default: 60000)
- `locationsOrderDirection`: LocationOrderDirection (Default: LocationOrderDirection.ascending)
- `disableAutoSyncOnCellular`: bool (Default: false)
- `maxRetries`: int (Default: 3)
- `retryBackoffBase`: int (Default: 1000)
- `retryBackoffCap`: int (Default: 60000)
- `enableDeltaCompression`: bool (Default: false)
- `deltaCoordinatePrecision`: int (Default: 5)
- `sslPinningFingerprints`: List<String>? (Default: null)
- `sslPinningCertificates`: List<String>? (Default: null)
